extension.summary: Watch live cricket streaming from freehit.eu
extension.description: Stream live cricket matches including IPL, PSL, and international cricket from freehit.eu. Features multiple quality options, EPG/schedule support, and live match notifications.
extension.news: v1.0.1 - Removed inputstream.adaptive dependency - Improved channel listing and stream quality selection - Added Clear All Cache option - Better live/offline channel indicators - Multi-source fallback support
extension.disclaimer: This add-on is not affiliated with freehit.eu. Streams are provided by third parties.
